title: General physical and chemical properties of the first row of transition elements, titanium to copper
summary: 9701 A Level d-block — variable oxidation states, coloured ions, and catalysis with PhET build-an-atom.
learningObjectives: Describe general properties of first-row transition elements.
Account for coloured ions and catalytic behaviour.
Compare trends across Ti to Cu.

simpleExplanation.title: The d-block
simpleExplanation.summary: Partially filled d orbitals give transition metals similar radii, multiple oxidation states, and coloured compounds.
steps: Variable oxidation states — close IE values.
Coloured ions from d–d transitions in complexes.

sections.content: **Transition elements** (28.1–28.5) are a major A Level block. Link **electronic structure** to **colour** and **catalysis**.
